title: PokeVerse
description: A dynamic Pokémon explorer built with React that fetches real time data from an external API and presents it through an interactive card based UI. Each refresh reshuffles the Pokémon set, creating a constantly evolving browsing experience.

title: ProductHub
description: A React based e commerce interface that utilizes Context API for global state management and React Router for seamless navigation. The application fetches product data from an external API and enables users to explore individual product detail pages through dynamic routing.

title: Productivity Dashboard
description: An all in one productivity dashboard designed to help users manage tasks, plan their day, and stay focused. The application integrates essential tools such as a Todo List, Daily Planner, Pomodoro Timer, Goal Tracker with streaks, motivational quotes, and a weather widget into a unified interface. Built using vanilla JavaScript, it emphasizes simplicity, usability, and efficient workflow management.

title: SoundKeys
description: An interactive virtual piano built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript that allows users to play musical notes directly from the keyboard or by clicking on-screen keys. The application provides real-time audio feedback and smooth key animations, creating an engaging and responsive musical experience in the browser.
